# TIZIRI — Handmade Moroccan Rugs

> TIZIRI (Tamazight for "moonlight") sells authentic handwoven Moroccan rugs sourced directly from Amazigh (Berber) artisan weavers in the Atlas Mountains. Every piece is one of a kind. Free shipping to the USA, 14-day free returns.

Currently 66 one-of-a-kind rugs ready to ship and 15 made-to-order designs, priced $340–$1,950 USD. Styles: Azilal, Beni Mrirt, Beni Ourain, Boujaad, Contemporary, Kilim, Mrirt.

- Every rug is handwoven by Amazigh (Berber) artisans in Morocco's Atlas
  Mountains region and is one of a kind — when a rug sells, it is gone.
- Wool is hand-spun and hand-knotted or flat-woven on traditional looms.
- Free FedEx shipping to the USA (2-5 business days in transit).
- 14-day free returns with full refund (US orders).
- Custom made-to-order rugs available in any size: https://tizirirugs.com/made-to-order/
- Contact: hello@tizirirugs.com

## Shop

- [All rugs](https://tizirirugs.com/collections/): the full collection, filterable by style and size
- [Machine-readable catalog](https://tizirirugs.com/catalog.md): every rug with price, size, material and link
- [Custom made-to-order](https://tizirirugs.com/made-to-order/): commission a rug in any size
- [Custom rug wizard](https://tizirirugs.com/custom-rug-wizard/): design your own rug online
- [Size calculator](https://tizirirugs.com/size-calculator/): find the right rug size for a room
- [Style finder](https://tizirirugs.com/style-finder/): quiz-style guide to Moroccan rug styles

## Guides

- [The Complete Guide to Beni Ourain Rugs](https://tizirirugs.com/blog/beni-ourain-rug-guide/): Everything you need to know about Beni Ourain rugs — what they are, how to authenticate one, how to style it, what to pay, and how to care for it for decades.
- [How to Tell if a Moroccan Rug is Authentic: 7 Things to Look For](https://tizirirugs.com/blog/how-to-authenticate-moroccan-rug/): Seven things to look for when buying a Moroccan rug — and four red flags that tell you it is machine-made or misrepresented.
- [How to Clean a Moroccan Wool Rug Without Ruining It](https://tizirirugs.com/blog/how-to-clean-moroccan-wool-rug/): The right way to clean, spot-treat and deep-wash a Moroccan wool rug — and the common mistakes that cause permanent damage.
- [The Complete Guide to Boujaad Rugs](https://tizirirugs.com/blog/boujaad-rug-guide/): Everything you need to know about Boujaad rugs — their bold color and history in the Rehamna region, how to spot a genuine one, how to style it, and what to pay.
- [The Complete Guide to Moroccan Kilim Rugs](https://tizirirugs.com/blog/kilim-rug-guide/): Everything you need to know about Moroccan kilim rugs — how flat-weave differs from pile, where to use one, how to spot a genuine hand-woven kilim, and what to pay.
- [The Complete Guide to Contemporary Moroccan Rugs](https://tizirirugs.com/blog/contemporary-moroccan-rug-guide/): Everything you need to know about contemporary Moroccan rugs — how modern designs are still hand-knotted by traditional weavers, how to buy one, and how to style it.
- [The Complete Guide to Mrirt Rugs](https://tizirirugs.com/blog/mrirt-rug-guide/): Everything you need to know about Mrirt rugs — the Middle Atlas weaving tradition behind them, how they compare to Beni Ourain, how to buy one, and what to pay.
- [Azilal & Boucherouite Rugs: Morocco's Free-Form Weaving Traditions](https://tizirirugs.com/blog/azilal-boucherouite-rug-guide/): Azilal and Boucherouite rugs both break from Morocco's geometric weaving conventions — one improvised on the loom, one woven from recycled cloth. What sets each apart, and how to buy one.
- [The Complete Guide to Moroccan Rugs](https://tizirirugs.com/blog/complete-moroccan-rug-guide/): Every Moroccan rug style explained in one place — Beni Ourain, Boujaad, Mrirt, Kilim, Contemporary, Azilal and Boucherouite — plus how to buy, size, and care for one.
- [Moroccan Rug Styling Guide](https://tizirirugs.com/blog/moroccan-rug-styling-guide/): Simple, practical ways to choose, place, and style a handmade Moroccan rug in your home — by room, by style, by color, and by the mistakes worth avoiding.
- [How Much Does a Moroccan Rug Cost? Real 2026 Prices](https://tizirirugs.com/blog/how-much-does-a-moroccan-rug-cost/): Real Moroccan rug prices by size and format — what determines cost, why identical-looking rugs vary in price, and what to be wary of when a price looks too good to be true.
- [Moroccan Rug Sizing Guide](https://tizirirugs.com/blog/moroccan-rug-sizing-guide/): How to choose the right rug size for a living room, bedroom, dining room or hallway — with real measurements, not guesswork.
- [Living Room Rug Guide: Size, Placement & Style](https://tizirirugs.com/blog/living-room-rug-guide/): How to choose the right Moroccan rug size and placement for a living room — sofa layouts, coffee table clearance, open-plan spaces, and which styles work best.
- [Bedroom Rug Guide: Size, Placement & Style](https://tizirirugs.com/blog/bedroom-rug-guide/): How to size and place a Moroccan rug in a bedroom — under the bed, beside it, or as a runner, sized for twin, queen and king frames.
- [Dining Room Rug Guide: Size, Placement & Style](https://tizirirugs.com/blog/dining-room-rug-guide/): How to size a rug for under a dining table — chair clearance math, why flat-weave beats pile here, and real dining room sizing by table shape.
- [Beni Ourain vs Mrirt: What's the Difference?](https://tizirirugs.com/blog/beni-ourain-vs-mrirt/): Beni Ourain and Mrirt rugs share the same high pile and Atlas Mountains origin — here's what actually separates them, and how to choose between the two.
- [Hand-Knotted vs Tufted vs Machine-Made Rugs](https://tizirirugs.com/blog/hand-knotted-vs-tufted-vs-machine-made/): What actually separates a hand-knotted rug from a tufted or machine-made one — construction, durability, lifespan, and how to tell which you're buying.
- [Vintage vs New Moroccan Rugs](https://tizirirugs.com/blog/vintage-vs-new-moroccan-rugs/): What actually distinguishes a vintage Moroccan rug from a new one — natural dyes, wear character, availability, and how to choose between them.
- [Rug Layering Guide: How to Layer Moroccan Rugs](https://tizirirugs.com/blog/rug-layering-guide/): How to layer a Moroccan rug over jute, sisal, or a larger neutral base — proportion rules, material pairing, and which styles layer best.
- [Moroccan Rug Gift Guide](https://tizirirugs.com/blog/moroccan-rug-gift-guide/): Why a handmade Moroccan rug makes a genuinely lasting gift — for housewarmings, weddings, and anniversaries — and how to choose a size and style for someone else's home.
- [Custom Moroccan Rug Guide: How Made-to-Order Works](https://tizirirugs.com/blog/custom-made-to-order-rug-guide/): How commissioning a made-to-order Moroccan rug actually works — the 3-step process, real timelines, sizing, and what to have ready before you enquire.
- [How to Store a Moroccan Rug](https://tizirirugs.com/blog/how-to-store-a-moroccan-rug/): How to clean, roll, and store a hand-knotted wool rug for months or years without moth damage, mildew, or crease lines that never come out.
- [Rug Stain? What to Do Right Now](https://tizirirugs.com/blog/rug-stain-what-to-do-right-now/): The first five minutes after a spill matter more than anything else. What to do immediately for wine, water, oil, and pet stains on a hand-knotted wool rug.
- [Do You Need a Rug Pad?](https://tizirirugs.com/blog/rug-pad-guide/): Why a rug pad matters for a hand-knotted wool rug — anti-slip safety, floor protection, and cushioning — and how to choose the right one for your floor type.
- [A Moroccan Rug in a Modern, Minimalist Interior](https://tizirirugs.com/blog/moroccan-rug-modern-minimalist-interior/): Why a handmade Moroccan rug works in a minimalist space — the one warm, textured, imperfect element in an otherwise pared-back room — and how to choose the right one.

- [FAQ](https://tizirirugs.com/faq/): common questions about ordering, shipping and care
